title: Trump’s mass firing just dealt another blow to American science
description: This past week delivered another gut punch for science in the US. This time, the target was the National Science Foundation—a federal agency that funds major research projects to the tune of around $9 billion. title: A new T-Mobile network for Christians aims to block porn and gender-related content
description: A new US-wide cell phone network marketed to Christians is set to launch next week. It blocks porn, which experts in network security say marks the first time a US cell plan has used network-level blocking for such content that can’t be turned off even by adult account owners. title: ChatGPT Images 2.0 is a hit in India, but not a big winner elsewhere, yet
description: Users in India are embracing ChatGPT Images 2.0 for creative, personal visuals — from avatars to cinematic portraits.

title: How Shivon Zilis Operated as Elon Musk’s OpenAI Insider
description: Messages presented at trial reveal how Zilis, the mother of four of Musk’s children, acted as an intermediary between him and OpenAI.

title: Sources: Anthropic potential $900B+ valuation round could happen within 2 weeks
description: Anthropic is asking investors to submit allocations for the AI company’s latest fundraise within the next 48 hours, according to sources familiar with the matter.

title: Good Luck Getting a Mac Mini for the Next ‘Several Months’
description: Apple CEO Tim Cook told analysts that AI adoption has happened faster than expected.

description: Apple said it will be supply-constrained on Mac mini, Studio, and Neo in the next quarter, too.

description: In this episode of Uncanny Valley, we get into how the Elon Musk-Sam Altman trial goes way beyond their rivalry and could have major implications both for OpenAI and also the AI industry at large.

title: Exclusive eBook: Inside the stealthy startup that pitched brainless human clones
description: The ultimate plan to live forever is a brand new body. title: Elon Musk Seemingly Admits xAI Has Used OpenAI’s Models to Train Its Own
description: While answering questions under oath, Musk argued it’s standard practice for AI labs to use their competitors’ models.

title: OpenAI Rolls Out ‘Advanced’ Security Mode for At-Risk Accounts
description: OpenAI is rolling out Advanced Account Security for people concerned that their ChatGPT or Codex accounts could be potential targets of phishing attacks.

title: This startup’s new mechanistic interpretability tool lets you debug LLMs
description: The San Francisco–based startup Goodfire just released a new tool, called Silico, that lets researchers and engineers peer inside an AI model and adjust its parameters—the settings that determine a model’s behavior—during training. title: Weight Banding
description: Weights in the final layer of common visual models appear as horizontal bands. We investigate how and why.
